description.text: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.

ru.original: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Защищай свою честь и кубы. Два куба и база.

es.original: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Defiende tu honor en este mapa de estilo oriental.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

de.original: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Verteidigt eure Ehre (und Generatoren) in dieser Arena. Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

pt.original: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Defenda sua honra e seus Cubos nesta arena. Dois Cubos e uma Base.

fr.original: Defend your honor and Cubes in this arena.  Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Défendez votre honneur et vos cubes dans cette arène. Deux cubes et une base.
